message:
feat(tui): one-shot contextual coach hints for first-use friction (br-1xt0m.1.4.3)

Add CoachHintManager with per-screen tips shown as toasts on first visit.
Hints are dismissed permanently and persisted across sessions via
dismissed_hints.json. All 14 screens have tailored tips. Disable globally
with AM_TUI_COACH_HINTS_ENABLED=false.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
